name: Simple greeting must not produce silent turn
description: User sends a one-word greeting ("hi"). The agent must emit at least one substantive text reply — never silence, never the legacy 'Done. What next?' recovery template. This case guards against the silent-turn regression class that bit us in 2026-05-11 when stale recovery events left in Firestore poisoned Gemini's context and the model emitted no output. Forward fix: capture as eval + tune prompt; never re-introduce runtime fallback copy.
